CartridgeInfo - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"

ChangeNotificationEventCode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
Provides the change notification event code.
ChangeNotificationEventData - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
The ChangeNotificationEventData class provides information about change notification events.
ChangeNotificationEventData() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.authorization.ChangeNotificationEventData
 
close(Context, String, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid.AccessoryService
Requests to close accessory with accessory context id.
com.hp.workpath.api - package com.hp.workpath.api
Provides classes for integrating with HP printer using HP Workpath SDK and contains all of the base classes.
com.hp.workpath.api.access - package com.hp.workpath.api.access
Provides interfaces for getting the current user information that is authenticated on a printer.
com.hp.workpath.api.accessory - package com.hp.workpath.api.accessory
Provides interfaces for handling accessories details.
com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid - package com.hp.workpath.api.accessory.hid
Provides interface for handling HID type of accessories
com.hp.workpath.api.attestation - package com.hp.workpath.api.attestation
Provides interfaces for getting the application token.
com.hp.workpath.api.authorization - package com.hp.workpath.api.authorization
Provides interfaces for retrieving Authorization
com.hp.workpath.api.config - package com.hp.workpath.api.config
Provides interfaces for handling application configuration data
com.hp.workpath.api.copier - package com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Provides interface for handling a copy job
com.hp.workpath.api.device - package com.hp.workpath.api.device
Provides interfaces for getting device information
com.hp.workpath.api.device.events - package com.hp.workpath.api.device.events
Provides interfaces for getting detail of device event
com.hp.workpath.api.device.settings - package com.hp.workpath.api.device.settings
Provides interfaces for handling device settings
com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage - package com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage
Provides interfaces for retrieving DeviceUsage
com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer - package com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer
Provides interfaces for retrieving device usage printer
com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.scanner - package com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.scanner
Provides interfaces for retrieving device usage scanner
com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email - package com.hp.workpath.api.helper.email
Provides interfaces for sending email
com.hp.workpath.api.job - package com.hp.workpath.api.job
Provides interfaces for getting/monitoring job details
com.hp.workpath.api.launcher - package com.hp.workpath.api.launcher
Provides interfaces for launching an application.
com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage - package com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
Provides interfaces for accessing mass storage.
com.hp.workpath.api.printer - package com.hp.workpath.api.printer
Provides interfaces for handling a print job
com.hp.workpath.api.scanner - package com.hp.workpath.api.scanner
Provides interfaces for handling a scanning job
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics
Provides interfaces for retrieving statistics
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Job info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.driverinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.driverinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Driver info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.emailinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.emailinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Email info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.faxinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.faxinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Fax info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.folderinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.folderinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Folder info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.ftpinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.ftpinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving FTP info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.httpinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.httpinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving HTTP info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.print - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.print
Provides interfaces for retrieving Print job info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.scan
Provides interfaces for retrieving Scan job info
com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.userinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.jobinfo.userinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving User info
com.hp.workpath.api.supplies - package com.hp.workpath.api.supplies
Provides interfaces for retrieving Supplies
com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo - package com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Provides interfaces for retrieving Supply info
com.hp.workpath.api.webservices - package com.hp.workpath.api.webservices
Provides interfaces for retrieving Web services
commit(Context, int, Result) - Static method in class com.hp.workpath.api.statistics.StatisticsService
Returns the result of requesting commit to update last job sequence
CONFIG_CHANGED - Static variable in class com.hp.workpath.api.Workpath.actions
Action sent as a broadcast intent by the Workpath service to an app with a receiver defined in the manifest when the app's configuration changes.
ConfigService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.config
ConfigService provides interfaces to access an application configuration for retrieving or updating detail.
ConfigService.AbstractConfigChangeObserver - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.config
Provides a mechanism to monitor the state of the ConfigService operations.
CopierService - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
CopierService provides an easy to use interface to initiate built-in tasks related to the copier.
CopyAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Job attributes for requesting a copy from the printer.
CopyAttributes.BackgroundCleanup - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Background Cleanup controls the level of removing background on a scanned image.
CopyAttributes.BookletBordersEachPage - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Booklet Borders Each Page for copy supported by the current printer
CopyAttributes.BookletFinishingOption - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Booklet Finishing Option for copy supported by the current printer
CopyAttributes.BookletFormat - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Booklet Format for copy supported by the current printer
CopyAttributes.CaptureMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Capture Mode for Copy
CopyAttributes.CollateMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Collate Mode controls sheet collation.
CopyAttributes.ColorMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
The color modes for copying supported by the current printer.
CopyAttributes.ContrastAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Contrast Adjustment controls the level of contrast correction on a scanned image.
CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T extends CopyAttributes.CopyAttributesBuilder<T>> - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Builder for creating CopyAttributes configured to copying.
CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Builder for creating CopyAttributes configured for regular copy including scanning and printing.
CopyAttributes.CopyPreview - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Copy Preview controls if device must show a preview of scanned images and request confirmation to copy final document.
CopyAttributes.DarknessAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Darkness Adjustment controls the level of darkness correction on a scanned image.
CopyAttributes.Duplex - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Duplex options supported by the current printer.
CopyAttributes.EraseMarginUnit - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Margin unit used for erase edge
CopyAttributes.FoldMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Fold mode for copy
CopyAttributes.ImageShiftReduceToFit - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
ImageShiftReduceToFit controls the image enlargement and reduction enable/disable
CopyAttributes.ImageShiftUnits - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Units used for Image Shifting supported by the current printer
CopyAttributes.JobAssemblyMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Job Assembly Mode controls whether to allow multiple scan segments assembled into a single job when completed.
CopyAttributes.JobExecutionMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Job Execution Mode controls whether to print the scanned images or store as a stored job
CopyAttributes.NumberUpDirection - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Number Up Direction controls the order of images placed on a printed sheet.
CopyAttributes.NumberUpMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Number Up Mode controls how many scanned images are placed per printer sheet.
CopyAttributes.Orientation - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Original Orientation options supported by the current printer.
CopyAttributes.OutputBin - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Output bin options suppprted by the current printer
CopyAttributes.PaperSize - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
The paper size for printing.
CopyAttributes.PaperSource - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Paper Source defines the tray that feeds the copy output.
CopyAttributes.PaperType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
The paper type for printing.
CopyAttributes.ProgressDialogMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Progress dialog mode options supported by current printer
CopyAttributes.PunchMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Punch mode for copy
CopyAttributes.RetentionMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Retention mode for stored copy job supported by current printer.
CopyAttributes.ScaleMode - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Scale Mode controls reduce-enlarge mode of a scanned image.
CopyAttributes.ScanSize - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
The scan size (i.e., size of the original) for scanning.
CopyAttributes.ScanSource - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Scan Source controls a feed source for scanning
CopyAttributes.SharpnessAdjustment - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Sharpness Adjustment controls the level of sharpness correction on a scanned image.
CopyAttributes.StampPosition - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Stamp Position for copy
CopyAttributes.StapleOption - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Staple mode for copy
CopyAttributes.StoreCopyBuilder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Builder for creating CopyAttributes configured to save copy job to the job storage to be released later.
CopyAttributes.TextGraphicsOptimization - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Enumeration of text versus graphics optimization settings
CopyAttributes.WatermarkBackgroundPattern - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Watermark Background Pattern for copy
CopyAttributes.WatermarkMessageType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Watermark Message Type for copy
CopyAttributes.WatermarkOnlyFirstPage - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Indicates if watermark should be OnlyFirstPage
CopyAttributes.WatermarkRotate45 - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Indicates if watermark should be rotated 45 degrees
CopyAttributes.WatermarkType - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Watermark Type for copy
CopyAttributesCaps - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Copy attributes capabilities provided from the printer.
CopyAttributesReader - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Reads attributes which are for requesting a copy from the printer.
CopyAttributesReader(CopyAttributes) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributesReader
Constructs this object from the copy attributes provided.
CopyBuilder() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.copier.CopyAttributes.CopyBuilder
Construct a new Builder for regular copy job.
CopyByMediaSize() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.deviceusage.printer.PrinterInfo.CopyByMediaSize
 
CopyJobData - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Copy Job details
CopyJobState - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Copy Job state details
CopyJobState.ActivityState - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Copy specific job sub-states
CopyJobState.State - Enum in com.hp.workpath.api.job
Copy specific job states
CopyletAttributes - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Attributes to determine behavior after submitting copy job.
CopyletAttributes.Builder - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.copier
Builder for creating an instance of CopyletAttributes.
Counter - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies.supplyinfo
Deprecated.
API 8 "Deprecated due to change in scope of supply data. Supply data are currently only managed by the 9 selected APIs:
  • Supply.getConsumableTypeEnum()
  • Supply.getMakeAndModel()
  • Supply.getProductNumber()
  • Supply.getSerialNumber()
  • Supply.getDescription()
  • Supply.getMarkerColor()
  • Supply.getApproxPercentRemaining()
  • Supply.Capacity.getMaxCapacity()
  • Supply.Capacity.getUnit()
"
CounterGroup - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.supplies
Counter group information
createNewFile() - Method in class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
Atomically creates a new, empty file named by this pathname.
CustomerDataFile - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
CustomerDataFile is user interface to representation of files and directories from a printer storage such as USB and HDD.
CustomerDataFile(Context, MassStorageInfo, String) - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFile
Creates a new CustomerDataFile instance from pathname
CustomerDataFileUtils - Class in com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage
The utility provides to read or write data from storage using CustomerDataFile object.
CustomerDataFileUtils() - Constructor for class com.hp.workpath.api.massstorage.CustomerDataFileUtils
